translation: def isOs(family: str, name: str, arch: str, version: str) -> bool:
if family is not None or name is not None or arch is not None or version is not None:
is9x = OS.__OS_NAME.find("95") != -1 or OS.__OS_NAME.find("98") != -1 or OS.__OS_NAME.find("me") != -1 or OS.__OS_NAME.find("ce") != -1
isFamily = OS.__PATH_SEP == ":" and not OS.__isFamily(OS.FAMILY_VMS) and (not OS.__isFamily(OS.FAMILY_MAC) or OS.__OS_NAME.endswith("x") or OS.__OS_NAME.find(OS.__DARWIN) != -1)
raise ValueError("Don\'t know how to detect OS family \"" + family + "\"")
retValue = isFamily and isName and isArch and isVersion
isWindows = OS.__OS_NAME.find(OS.FAMILY_WINDOWS) != -1 if OS.__OS_NAME is not None else False
is9x = OS.__OS_NAME.find("95") != -1 or OS.__OS_NAME.find("98") != -1 or OS.__OS_NAME.find("me") != -1 or OS.__OS_NAME.find("ce") != -1
retValue = OS.__OS_NAME.find(OS.FAMILY_OS2) != -1 if OS.__OS_NAME is not None else False
retValue = OS.__OS_NAME.find(OS.FAMILY_NETWARE) != -1 if OS.__OS_NAME is not None else False
retValue = OS.__OS_NAME.find(OS.FAMILY_MAC) != -1 or OS.__OS_NAME.find(OS.__DARWIN) != -1 if OS.__OS_NAME is not None else False
retValue = OS.__OS_NAME.find("nonstop_kernel") != -1 if OS.__OS_NAME is not None else False

retValue = OS.__PATH_SEP == ":" and not OS.__isFamily(OS.FAMILY_VMS) and (not OS.__isFamily(OS.FAMILY_MAC) or OS.__OS_NAME.endswith("x") or OS.__OS_NAME.find(OS.__DARWIN) != -1) if OS.__OS_NAME is not None else False
retValue = OS.__OS_NAME.find(OS.FAMILY_ZOS) != -1 or OS.__OS_NAME.find("os/390") != -1 if OS.__OS_NAME is not None else False
retValue = OS.__OS_NAME.find(OS.FAMILY_OS400) != -1 if OS.__OS_NAME is not None else False
retValue = OS.__OS_NAME.find(OS.FAMILY_VMS) != -1 if OS.__OS_NAME is not None else False
raise ValueError("Don\'t know how to detect OS family \"" + family + "\"")

body: private static final String PATH_SEP = File.pathSeparator;

translation: __OS_VERSION: str = os.getenv('os.version') if os.getenv('os.version') is not None else ""
